rulings.Case Title: MERCHANTS FINANCIAL GUARDIAN INC. VS. BERNADETTE D SMITH et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Order Granting Relief From Default
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, February 2, 2010, line 6, DEFENDANT BERNADETTE SMITH Motion For Order Granting Relief From Default. Is granted, defendant's declaration supports relief under CCP section 473 and Plaintiff failed to file supplemental opposition. =(302/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: TRAVELERS PROPERTY CASUALTY COMPANY OF AMERICA A VS. SUPERIOR AUTOMATIC SPRINKLER CO A CORPORATION et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, February 2, 2010, line 15, DEFENDANT SUPERIOR AUTOMATIC SPRINKLER COMPANY DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Is overruled with twenty days leave to answer. Facts plead sufficient to allege that defendant had actual or constructive knowledge of plaintiff's intent to file a subrogation claim at the time the release and settlement agreement were signed. =(302/AJR)
